name: European Eel
conservationEfforts: EU Eel Regulation requires management plans. Fish passage facilities at dams. Glass eel fishery quotas. Restocking programs in rivers.
description: Born in the Sargasso Sea, European eels drift across the Atlantic as larvae, enter European rivers where they live for 5-20 years, then mysteriously return to the Sargasso to spawn and die. No one has ever observed them spawning.
